title: Ubiquiti UA-Intercom-Viewer
description: UA-Intercom-Viewer complements the Unifi Access series, and when connected to UA-Intercom, it is used to communicate with a person at the intercom outside closed spaces and possibly enable entry. The compact and elegant video phone is designed for maximum user comfort and reliability . It connects to the network via an Ethernet port. through which it is also powered (48V DC passive POE) UA-Intercom-Viewer has a touch screen with a resolution 720 x 1280 px (9:16), which ensures a sharp and detailed image for better identification of visitors. Thanks to the integrated microphone and speaker , you can easily communicate with visitors The ideal choice for anyone looking for a simple and reliable solution for access control and communication in a building. With its wide range of functions and simple integration, it will become an indispensable part of your security system Touch screen 720 x 1280 px Instant Live view Two-way audio Device Wall mount Drilling template Mounting kit
specsSearch: Connectors and Interfaces LAN speed (1) 10/100Mbps Power Power over Ethernet 48V DC Power type PoE Max. power consumption [W] 5
